title: clypeola lanuginosa
intro: Clypeola lanuginosa, also known as woolly cleome, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Clypeola lanuginosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
